name: mostParamGetData
title: mostParamGetData
syntax: long mostParamGetData(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], byte buffer[], long buffersize); // form 1
long mostParamGetData(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long arrayIndex, byte buffer[], long buffersize); // form 2
description: Query of parameters of the String type or RawStream from an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog.
With strings, the coding and scheduling in the message are taken into account.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message from which the parameter value should be read.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see Symbolic Identification of Parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer to which the parameter bytes are copied.

parameters.name: buffersize
parameters.description: Maximum number of copied parameter bytes (can be specified with (elcount(buffer))).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
